text: Fixed rate and ARM financing is readily available for qualified borrowers. Rates have remained stable in the previous months. The area employment remains above average. Local market conditions are considered good. Typical marketing times are under 60 days. Neighborhood appeal is average. Typical sales do involve seller paid concessions. Supply and demand of similar homes appear to be in favor of demand. Most residents commute to Bloomington-Normal  for employment or farm local land.
